description: The Porsche 911, produced since 1963, is the definitive rear-engined sports car and one of the most iconic nameplates in automotive history. From the air-cooled 930 Turbo through to the modern 992, the 911 has evolved across ten generations while retaining its unmistakable silhouette and flat-six engine. Early air-cooled models — particularly the 930, 964 RS, and 993 — are among the most sought-after collector cars in the world.
